title: Season's Greetings
description: Adds features related to holidays with the aim to update or add things on those holidays.
body: [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1378839788659933345?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/maQ6tE6Nsd) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1150262?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=CurseForge&color=f16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seasons-greetings) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/seasons-greetings?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=00af5c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/seasons-greetings) [![Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.21.1-6b6b88?style=flat-square&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seasons-greetings/files) --- ### 📋 About On holidays, people come together, whether it be for family gatherings, events with friends, or otherwise. We wanted to bring that experience to Minecraft - and thus, **Season's Greetings** was born. Currently, it includes festive blocks, items, and mobs, such as Hot Cocoa, Snow Golem decorating features, Presents, Gingerbread, and more! \:-) --- ### 🔧 Information ✅ Supported  ▪  ⚠️ Maintenance  ▪  ❌ Deprecated | Feature | Details | |---|---| | **Mod Loaders** | Fabric NeoForge | | **MC Versions** | ⚠️1.21.1 |
